summary: TUI session generated many .md files; replaced with .mimi/memory JSON system
detail: The first TUI build session (tuisesh) had the agent generate 12+ markdown documentation files (TUI_BANNER.txt, TUI_COMPLETE.md, TUI_IMPLEMENTATION.md, etc.) as a side effect of building. These are noise — the memory system replaces them with structured, indexable JSON that the agent can navigate without reading everything.
